data.title: Update project docs to reflect local workflow simplification
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update all project documentation that references the removed enforcement hooks, two-layer review gate, and direct-push merge flow.
**Why**: Stale documentation referencing non-existent gates will cause agents to follow wrong instructions and developers to expect enforcement that no longer exists.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md Critical Rules (rules 12, 13, 22, 25 — rewrite for PR-based enforcement model), CLAUDE.md architecture section (remove hook descriptions, update commit workflow reference), REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (remove review-status gate references), per-worktree-review-commit.md (remove record-test-status.sh step and review-status references), health-check.sh (update or remove review-status scan), sprint SKILL.md (update review-status and merge-to-main.sh references), KNOWN-ISSUES.md
- OUT: Creating new documentation files, Epic A (CI pipeline) documentation

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md Critical Rules section accurately reflects the PR-based enforcement model: rules 12, 13, 22, 25 rewritten to remove references to two-layer review gate, pre-commit hooks, review-status files, and local bypass detection
  ← Satisfies: "COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md updated to reflect simplified local workflow"
- When this story is complete, REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md, per-worktree-review-commit.md, health-check.sh, and sprint SKILL.md no longer reference removed gates or artifacts
  ← Satisfies: "COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md updated to reflect simplified local workflow"

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
